goal: Generate synthetic events by applying blob-level motion and event rendering.
requirements: For MVP, implement a simple event simulator based on intensity changes caused by blob motion.
Warp each blob according to its motion context.
Generate ON/OFF events when the contrast threshold is crossed.
Aggregate events from all blobs into one event stream.
Keep blob_id and semantic_label as optional event metadata for debugging.
Avoid unrealistic event bursts by clipping maximum events per blob per timestep.

event_format.p: polarity, +1 for ON and -1 for OFF

output.events: N x 4 or N x 6 event array
